string 2:
Come out, Titans! Where are ya hidin'?! We Bearmon Brothers
are gonna take ya out!
Y-Yeah!
{next}We already beat the Titans.
{next}You're too late.
{next}Rawr! I'm a Titan!
What? Ya gotta be kiddin' me...
Whoa...
What?! It's all because YOU were so slow!
Aww, don't be mean, Big Bro...

Aha! There's one! ...Huh. It's a lot more wimpy-lookin' than
I expected!
Um, Big Bro? I don't think that's a Titan.

So, the Titans are gone, huh? Then what'd we even come here
for?

Yeah! Why'd they tell us in Central Town there were still
Titans scattered around?

Hey, I know! I bet the ones ya took out were just little
small fry.

We gotta take all the Titan remnants down, and their bosses,
too!

B-But ain't it a little dangerous to go straight for the
bosses...?

Danger makes ya stronger! Anyway, I'm goin'! You go bash
some Titans, too! Catch ya later!
B-but, Big Bro!

H-Hey, you guys beat Titans before, right? Can ya help me
and my brother?
{next}Sure, we'll help.
{end}We're busy.
Really?! Thanks!

Aww. But I can't do this alone, and I'm worried about my Big
Bro, too...

Pretty please! Help me and my Big Bro take down the Titan
leader!

From what I heard in the tavern, there are two Titans left
here! Will ya help us?
{next}Sure, we'll help.
{end}We're busy.
Really?! Thanks!

Aww. But I can't do this alone, and I'm worried about my Big
Bro, too...

I'll feel a lot better havin' ya there! Okay, then! I'll run
on ahead!

Where, ya ask? Oh, right. ...Okay. I just sent ya the info.
See ya later!
Ah, there ya are! This way!

This guy used to be a Titan leader! Let's take it down
together!
Not so tough now, eh?! ...Although, I mostly just watched...

We managed all right, but Big Bro is probably fightin' the
other leader alone.

I hope Big Bro is okay... Hey, I'm goin' on ahead! I sent ya
the details. Come meet me!
Big Bro!
Oh, it's you... Did ya take out that other Titan leader?!
Yeah! And I had some help!
Oh, yeah...? Tch! Ya ain't supposed to rely on others.
Worry about that later! Right now, we need to fight!
We did it, Big Bro!
...Meh. I coulda handled that on my own.

...Well, there ain't any more strong opponents to fight
around here.

I need to find a bigger challenge. Guess I'll move on to the
next spot...
Well, wherever ya go, I'll be right there with ya!

Hey, I been thinkin'... Are we really good enough the way we
are now?
What're ya sayin'...? You don't wanna fight with me no more?

Nah, it ain't like that. Only, if ya stick with me, yer
never gonna stop bein' soft.

I mean, even I stop pushin' myself to get stronger when I
know I got ya there with me.

D-Don't say that! Please! I'll work harder, I swear! Just
let me stay with ya!

Look. The world's a cruel place. We may end up gettin' split
up no matter what we want.
So I say we make a promise, right here and now.
A promise?

The base of that big tree oughta do fine. C'mon. Get
diggin'!
There! I buried our resolution as brothers.

Even if we end up goin' down different paths, we're gonna
meet up back here again someday.
Yeah... It's a promise...
...Yeah.

Ya helped my little bro out. I want ya to take this by way
of payment.
Anyway, see ya later. Take care of yerself, okay?
Thanks for everythin'! And take care!

I'm not sad, I'm not sad... I'll be fine on my own, just
like Big Bro... *sniffle*

You dig up a box from the base of the tree. Inside is a note
with forceful handwriting.

The note reads, "Let's bring peace to Iliad together, the
two of us!"
You return the note to the box and quietly rebury it...
